label: Search File Contents
description: Search for text across all markdown files in the vault.

function.name: grep_search
function.description: Search for a text string across all markdown file contents in the vault. Returns matching lines with file paths and line numbers (e.g. 'folder/note.md:12: matching line'). Case-insensitive. Optionally filter by file path pattern.

query.description: The text to search for in file contents. Case-insensitive.

file_pattern.description: Optional filter: only search files whose path contains this string (e.g. 'journal/' or 'project').
